title: Complete Analysis: workflow:plan, workflow:lite-plan, issue:plan Implementation Patterns
context: Analyze and document the complete implementation patterns of three core workflows (workflow:plan, workflow:lite-plan, issue:plan) to provide technical foundation for new workflow development. Must include: Slash Command registration, Skill integration, JSON Schema registration, CCW server interaction, Agent implementation patterns, and all discovery/analysis methods (ACE tool, Gemini CLI, etc.).
expected_behavior: Three comprehensive technical documentation files covering: (1) workflow:plan full implementation flow with all integration points, (2) workflow:lite-plan implementation patterns and differences, (3) issue:plan closed-loop implementation. Each document must include code references, architecture diagrams, and implementation evidence from actual codebase.
actual_behavior: No consolidated technical documentation exists for these workflow implementations, making it difficult to understand patterns for new workflow development.
